form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th over 2100m at Vincennes, beaten 12m by King Look in 6-8yo gelding race on March 20 at $12. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 6.6m (25m) at Vire beating Kerosen Du Gers in 6yo handicap on March 1 at $5.50. Will give a good account.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to impress last start; 5th over 2100m at Vincennes, beaten 12m by King Look in 6-8yo gelding race on March 20 at $12. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 6.6m (25m) at Vire beating Kerosen Du Gers in 6yo handicap on March 1 at $5.50. Will give a good account.

form.formComment: Six-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Chatelaillon La Rochelle and Lisieux. Last start posted a big 4.2m win at Chatelaillon La Rochelle beating King D'hermes in 6-8yo race on March 29 at $2.90. Recent form hard to fault.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd over 2000m at Lyon-Parilly beaten 13m by Kara D'or in 6-8yo race on March 31 at $5.10. Strong prospects.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 5th over 2150m at this track, beaten 9m by Iziaslav Tek in 6-8yo race on December 14 at $61. Facing a tough task first-up.

form.formComment: Last start by 5.4m at Cholet beating Kancalais in 6-8yo race on March 22. In the right form and can score again.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd over 2800m at Cholet beaten 35m by Kerosen Du Gers in 6-8yo race on March 22. Two runs back 8th over 2825m at Cordemais beaten 48m by Jutonniere in 7-8yo race on February 27 at $87. Not likely to trouble the top few.

form.formComment: Returns to racing after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation when at very long odds behind King De L'ouest. Looks to be making up the numbers.

form.formComment: Last start 8th over 2875m at Enghien, beaten 14m by Kart Haufor in 6yo race on March 10 at $19. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (25m) over 2850m at Mauquenchy beaten 17m by Kara De Pierrepont in 6-10yo handicap on February 12 at $6.70. One of the key runners.

form.formComment: Meets Ketberny again; when 11.7L fifth at Lisieux over 2675m in a 6-8yo gelding race race on March 14. Can't have on that basis.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Kouroux at Vire over 2800m in a 6yo handicap on March 1 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.4m finishing second behind Kerosen Du Gers at Cholet over 2800m in a 6-8yo race on March 22. Can improve. Sure to be in the finish.
